source: Planning London Datahub (planningdata.london.gov.uk/api-guest), approved applications since 2023 matching child-relevant keywords (school/nursery/playground/health/community/new open space). Joined primarily by point-in-polygon on each application's centroid; a small residual falls back to borough+ward-name matching or is unmatched (see match_stats). Applications matching the broad search but not the stricter facility classifier (e.g. street addresses containing the word 'Park') are excluded.
